visual_description: A man in a dark suit lies prone on the hood of a car while another suited man stands behind him and a third man in a light suit kneels nearby. The view shifts to a close‑up of a man in a dark suit gripping a handgun with both hands and aiming it forward with a focused expression. A blurred figure with blood on his face appears in the background.
audio_description: The audio is silent, with no discernible speech or ambient noise.
